summary_text: Concrete findings that affect a draft-only x-auto deliverable: - SSOT policy is in [docs/agents/x-auto-contract.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/x-auto-contract.md): default mode is `draft`, schedulable drafts should target `800-1000字`, and publish-facing text should avoid proper nouns/brands unless explicitly requested. - For this Forbes-based request, [docs/x-auto-note-linking-rule.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/x-auto-note-linking-rule.md) is not the primary rule unless it is a `note.com` lead-post. So treat the Forbes URL as source evidence in `Source URLs`/`source_urls`, not as a forced body URL pattern. - Existing repo template pattern is source-grounded: [docs/drafts/20260402_x-auto_source_grounded_drafts.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/drafts/20260402_x-auto_source_grounded_drafts.md) uses per-section `Source:` + long-form `Body:`, and [docs/drafts/20260402_x-auto_notion_manifest.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/drafts/20260402_x-auto_notion_manifest.md) maps each section to `Body JA`. - Candidate row schema is visible in [docs/drafts/20260402_x-auto_queue_candidates.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/drafts/20260402_x-auto_queue_candidates.json): `title`, `status:draft`, `posted:false`, `scheduled_for`, `source_url`/`source_urls`, `body`, `body_ja`, `text`, `pillar`, `category`, `pattern`, `image_path`. - Draft readiness conventions in [docs/drafts/20260403_x_auto_readiness_report.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/drafts/20260403_x_auto_readiness_report.md): keep rows in `draft`; missing `scheduled_for` and `image_path` are blockers only for advancing beyond draft, not for initial draft creation. - Helper scripts found are operational/image-focused, not body-generation templates: `scripts/local/integrations/xauto-thumbnail-gen.js`, `scripts/local/integrations/xauto-sync-approved-thumbnail.py`, and `scripts/local/xauto_sync_missing_draft_thumbnails.py`. There is no repo-local script that auto-generates compliant draft body text from an article URL.
